news.t: Best ETFs to Invest In, According to AI Analyst, 2/13/2026
T. ROWE PRICE ADDS THREE NEW TRANSPARENT SECTOR OFFERINGS TO ITS ACTIVE ETF ROSTER

holdings.infoBox: TFNS is an equity ETF with a total of 77 individual holdings. The top holdings are Berkshire Hathaway stock at 9.67%, Visa Inc. at 6.71%, Mastercard at 5.64%, Bank of America at 5.19%, and JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 5.04%.

overview.description: The T. Rowe Price Financials ETF (TFNS) is an exchange-traded fund. The ETF currently has 13.64m in AUM and 78 holdings. TFNS is an actively managed ETF, aiming to outperform its respective sector index TFNS was launched on Jun 11, 2025 and is issued by T. Rowe Price.
